    3. Arizona

    Arizona Senior Living Facilities & Care Homes

    18 senior living communities in Arizona - pick a city on the map, or browse the list. Hover or tap a community to see where it is.

    What's available in Arizona

    • Assisted Living - 16 communities
    • Memory Care - 14 communities
    • Independent Living - 12 communities
    • Skilled Nursing - 4 communities
    • CCRC / Life Plan - 2 communities

    How Arizona regulates senior care

    Assisted living centers and small assisted living homes are licensed by the Arizona Department of Health Services; skilled nursing facilities are CMS-certified.

    Small homes: Assisted living homes care for up to 10 residents in residential settings - how to evaluate one.

    Arizona resources for families

    • Arizona Department of Health Services, Bureau of Residential Facilities Licensing - license & inspection lookup (how to read reports)
    • Eldercare Locator - 1-800-677-1116 - free federal referral line to local aging services
    • Your local Area Agency on Aging - options counseling and help paying for care
    • Long-Term Care Ombudsman - resident advocates who know each facility's complaint history

    New to this?

    Start with how to choose a facility, levels of care, and what it really costs.

    • Terms of Service
    • Privacy Policy

    Senior Living Community is an independent information resource for families, and the resident's quality of life comes first here - then the family, then the facility. We are not a referral service and do not provide medical, legal, or financial advice - for decisions about care, consult the professionals involved. Facility details change; always confirm directly with a community. Listings are never paid placements. Last data review: 2026-07-11. Run a senior living community? Claim your free listing or see our marketing services for communities. Terms · Privacy.
